title: Software Update - DFU -  Houston...  Retry button
scenario: Verify that tapping Retry after a DFU failure (triggered by turning off headset at ~10% progress) directs the user back to the previous screen to reattempt the update.
steps: Pair headset and launch the app.
Go to Device Settings > Software Update.
Trigger DFU failure by turning off the headset at ~10% progress.
expected: User is directed to the previous screen where the update process will attempt again.
